page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Tools for efficient k-mer counting and filtering of reads based on k-mer content.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Kmc is a utility designed for counting k-mers (sequences of consecutive k symbols) in a set of reads from genome sequencing projects.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: KMC is a utility designed for counting k-mers (sequences of consecutive k symbols) in a set of reads from genome sequencing projects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: KMC is a utility designed for counting k-mers (sequences of consecutive k symbols) in a set of reads from genome sequencing projects.
